section_miscategorizations.text: He checks his blood sugar two or three times a week, with readings typically in the range of 120-140 and hemoglobin A1c of 7.0.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Home glucose readings are appropriately subjective, but hemoglobin A1c 7.0 is an objective lab value; mixing it into S is a mild organizational issue but unlikely to mislead.
Although metformin was not listed in S as a current medication, documenting continuation of an existing medication is a plan/action and belongs in P; this is appropriate and not a miscategorization.
